
### information flow graph (1a)  {.smaller}


```
def f(a, b, c):
    desc = 'a={},b={}'.format(a, b)
    if b > 10:
        y = a
    else:
        y = c
    w = y + a
    pair = (w, c)
    desc = desc + \
         ',pair={}'.format(pair)
    print(desc)
    return y

```
 
![](/static/info-flow-graph1.svg){}


### information flow graph (1b)  {.smaller}



* ex: does returned value depend on a, b, c?
* ex: does value of pair depend on a, b, c?
* ex: does printed value depend on a, b, c?
 
![](/static/info-flow-graph1.svg){}
